first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are all semantically equivalent across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing, such as 'software craftsmanship' versus 'full-stack development', are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills. The evaluation remains focused on the technical fit for the role.
